data.description: In Moscow on October 13, a meeting of the foreign ministers of the League of Arab States will be held to consider draft final documents of the first Russia-Arab summit, Lavrov said in an interview

data.title: Blenders Eyewear and Coach Prime collaborate for breast cancer initiative; 100% profits from PRIME21 MOD support Keep A Breast Foundation.
data.description: All proceeds from the exclusive PRIME21 MOD sunglasses will go towards supporting the Keep A Breast Foundation. Blenders Eyewear, a prominent eyewear brand within the Safilo Group, has partnered with Deion "Coach Prime" Sanders to raise awareness for breast cancer. The initiative, scheduled for October 9, 2025 in San Diego, will donate 100% of profits from the limited-edition sunglasses to the cause.

data.title: Kerri Schoonyoung joins Exceptional Women Alliance with over 25 years of experience as CEO of Dept 11, Inc.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 9, 2025, the Exceptional Women Alliance (EWA) announced the addition of Kerri Schoonyoung, Founder and CEO of Dept. 11, Inc., to its cohort of successful female leaders. Schoonyoung brings over 25 years of expertise to the network, solidifying her position among influential women in the industry.

data.title: Red Sea Global partners with Adobe and Globant to offer personalized digital experiences on VisitRedSea.com using AI technology.
data.description: Red Sea Global will utilize Adobe's AI technology to enhance VisitRedSea.com and draw visitors to Saudi Arabia's emerging destination. Through Adobe Experience Manager, visitors will receive tailored communications reflecting their preferences and historical interactions.

data.title: Survey by CertaPro Painters finds 87% of consumers feel happy or refreshed with a freshly painted interior.
data.description: According to recent research, 87% of consumers reported that a newly painted interior space made them feel happy or more refreshed. This study was conducted by CertaPro Painters®, known as North America's Most Referred Painting Company®, between April and June. The findings were based on social media polls posted on Instagram during that time period.

data.title: Helen Of Troy (HELE) reports 51% profit drop in Q2, shares plummet 16%. Future uncertain due to tariffs and cost pressures.
data.description: HELE shares dropped by over 16% in premarket trading after reporting a 51% decrease in second-quarter adjusted earnings per share. Adjusted earnings per share decreased by 51.2% year-over-year to 59 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 53 cents. Quarterly sales also fell by 8.9% year-over-year to $431.8 million, exceeding expectations of $418.8 million. The company cited persistent cost pressures and tariff-related disruptions impacting results for the rest of fiscal 2026. Home & Outdoor net sales declined by 13.7% year-over-year. The company anticipates these challenges to continue throughout the year.
The US dollar weakened as the Yen rose to 152.14 during morning trade.
Japan's Takaichi stated that "JGBs are held overwhelmingly by domestic investors," calling Japan's bond market "the most stable in the world"

data.title: Silver hits record $50/ounce, up 73% YTD, best performance since 2010. Gold up 54%, also at record highs.
data.description: Silver prices soared past a significant milestone as they reached $50 per ounce on Thursday, surpassing the previous record from April 2011. This surge is attributed to investors flocking to precious metals amidst predictions of continuous Federal Reserve rate cuts. The iShares Silver Trust (NYSE: SLV) reported a remarkable 73% increase year to date, positioning it for the best annual performance since 2010, when it gained 83%. The most exceptional year for silver remains 1979, with a whopping 360% surge. In comparison, gold is trading at over $4,000 per ounce and has seen a 54% increase this year, setting it up for the most outstanding performance since 1979 when it rose by 133%. Thursday marked silver's eighth consecutive week of gains, its most robust upward trend since 2020, indicating a strong momentum rally with no immediate signs of stopping. Analysts are considering the potential for silver to continue its upward trajectory.

data.title: First Solar, Inc. will announce Q3 2025 financial results on October 30, 2025 at 4:30 PM ET. Conference call info provided.
data.description: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) will announce its financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2025, on Thursday, October 30, 2025, after the market closes. The conference call is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 PM ET. Interested individuals can access the live webcast at investor.firstsolar.com. A replay of the webcast will be available on the Investors section of the Company's website until Saturday, November 29, 2025.

data.title: Bank of South Carolina Corp. reported Q3 earnings of $2,143,640, an increase of 18.97% from Q3 2024, with total nine-month earnings at $5,893,809 - a 19.51% increase from the same period last year. Annualized returns on assets and equity also showed improvement. CEO credited strong margin, fee income, and expense management for the record earnings, also raising cash dividend for the third time in twelve months.
data.description: The Bank of South Carolina Corporation reported unaudited earnings of $2,143,640, or $0.40 basic and $0.38 diluted earnings per share, for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, showing an 18.97% increase from the same period in 2024. For the nine months ended September 30, 2025, earnings increased by 19.51% to $5,893,809 compared to the previous year. Annualized returns on average assets and equity improved to 1.37% and 14.03% respectively. President and CEO Eugene H. Walpole stated that strong net interest margin, steady fee income, and expense management led to these results. The company raised the cash dividend for the second consecutive quarter, highlighting a successful year. Total interest and fee income rose to $7,317,405 for the quarter. The full story is on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Flyntlok gets $36M investment from Mainsail Partners to enhance AI for heavy equipment dealers in Alaska.
data.description: Alaska-based Flyntlok, a company offering a cloud-based DMS for heavy equipment dealers, has disclosed a significant development. Mainsail Partners has committed a substantial investment of $36 million in Flyntlok for its growth. This investment is aimed at supporting Flyntlok's expansion and further development of their DMS platform.

data.title: Neumont College of Computer Science becomes Neumont University to reflect growth and commitment to next-gen students.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, on October 9, 2025, Neumont College of Computer Science revealed its transition to Neumont University. This change signifies the institution's expansion in academic offerings and ongoing dedication to shaping the future workforce. The rebranding aligns with the university's evolution and advancement, aiming to equip students for success in the ever-changing tech landscape.
